prompt: Bootstrap this repo so a Claude agent can navigate it — generate a design doc and a knowledge graph, then commit it.

assertions.text: AGENT_DESIGN_DOC.md exists at the repo root

AGENT_DESIGN_DOC.md (or slim version) contains all 10 sections in order: What This Project Does, Architecture, Core Data Structures, Key Algorithms, Business Logic Rules, External Dependencies, Configuration, Error Handling, Testing Strategy, Open Questions
Design doc claims cite source via `file:line` pattern (at least 3 such citations in §§3-8)
If AGENT_DESIGN_DOC.md > 200 lines, .agent-docs/ directory exists with 7 expected files
Git history shows exactly one new commit since the start of the run
The new commit message exactly equals `feat: make repo agent-ready with knowledge graph auto-update and design doc`
The new commit body does NOT contain `Co-Authored-By:` (any variant)
The new commit staged files are a subset of the allowlist (.understand-anything/*.json, AGENT_DESIGN_DOC.md, .agent-docs/*.md, CLAUDE.md, ARCHITECTURE.md)
No `git push` was performed (remote HEAD unchanged or no remote)
